unternehmen_ref.label: Unternehmen
unternehmen_ref.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Unternehmen' with the id `69ce2a10b74844016addd82e` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69ce2a10b74844016addd82e/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

ausstellungsdatum.label: Ausstellungsdatum
ausstellungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

gueltig_bis.label: Gültig bis
gueltig_bis.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

dokument_datei.label: Dokument (Datei-Upload)
dokument_datei.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69ce2a186fb9551311abbd7f/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

dokument_url.label: Dokument-Link (URL)
dokument_url.description: An URL value according to RFC 3986 (or `null`/`None`).
